fields.Name: YourMembership
fields.Description: YourMembership AMS integration for syncing members, membership types, events, and registrations

fields.Name: Members
fields.Description: Organization members with profile, contact, and membership details

fields.Name: Events
fields.Description: Events including conferences, webinars, and meetings with dates and virtual meeting info

fields.Name: MemberTypes
fields.Description: Classification types for members (e.g., Individual, Corporate, Student)

fields.Name: Memberships
fields.Description: Membership plans with dues amounts, proration rules, and invoice settings

fields.Name: Groups
fields.Description: Committees, chapters, sections, and other organizational groups

fields.Name: Products
fields.Description: Store products available for purchase with pricing, inventory, and tax info

fields.Name: DonationFunds
fields.Description: Donation fund definitions for directing charitable contributions

fields.Name: Certifications
fields.Description: Professional certifications and continuing education programs

fields.Name: InvoiceItems
fields.Description: Individual line items from invoices including dues, events, store purchases, and donations

fields.Name: DuesTransactions
fields.Description: Membership dues payment transactions with status, amounts, and membership details

fields.Name: EventRegistrations
fields.Description: Event registration records with attendee details, status, badge numbers, and attendance tracking

fields.Name: EventSessions
fields.Description: Breakout sessions within events including presenter, schedule, and CEU eligibility

fields.Name: EventTickets
fields.Description: Ticket types for events with pricing, quantity limits, and categories

fields.Name: EventCategories
fields.Description: Categories for organizing and classifying events

fields.Name: MemberGroups
fields.Description: Association between members and their group/committee memberships

fields.Name: Connections
fields.Description: Networking connections between members including contact info and connection status

fields.Name: DonationHistory
fields.Description: Individual donation records per member with amounts, funds, and payment methods

fields.Name: EngagementScores
fields.Description: Member engagement scoring metrics tracking participation and activity levels

fields.Name: GroupTypes
fields.Description: Classification types for groups (e.g., Committee, Chapter, Section)

fields.Name: DonationTransactions
fields.Description: Donation payment transactions with member, fund, and payment details. DateFrom must be within 90 days.

fields.Name: StoreOrders
fields.Description: Online store order headers with order date, status, and shipping info

fields.Name: StoreOrderDetails
fields.Description: Individual line items within store orders with product, pricing, and quantity details

fields.Name: CertificationsJournals
fields.Description: Continuing education journal entries tracking CEU credits earned by members

fields.Name: CertificationCreditTypes
fields.Description: Types of continuing education credits (e.g., CEU, CPE) with expiration rules

fields.Name: CareerOpenings
fields.Description: Job board postings with position, organization, salary, and contact details

fields.Name: Campaigns
fields.Description: Email marketing campaigns with scheduling, sender, and delivery status

fields.Name: GLCodes
fields.Description: General ledger codes for financial reporting and accounting integration

fields.Name: MembersProfiles
fields.Description: Comprehensive member profile data including custom fields, richer than basic member list

fields.Name: PeopleIDs
fields.Description: Member and non-member identity records for data synchronization with timestamp support

fields.Name: MembersGroupsBulk
fields.Description: Bulk member-to-group assignments with group codes and primary group designation

fields.Name: FinanceBatches
fields.Description: Financial processing batches grouping transactions by commerce type and close date. DISABLED: YM API pagination is broken for this endpoint — returns the same full result set on every page regardless of PageNumber, causing infinite loops.

fields.Name: FinanceBatchDetails
fields.Description: Detailed invoice and payment records within financial processing batches

fields.Name: AllCampaigns
fields.Description: Extended campaign data with scheduling, processing counts, categories, and version info

fields.Name: CampaignEmailLists
fields.Description: Email distribution lists for campaigns with totals, bounces, and opt-out metrics

fields.Name: EventAttendeeTypes
fields.Description: Attendee type definitions per event (e.g., Member, Non-Member, Speaker)

fields.Name: EventSessionGroups
fields.Description: Logical groupings of sessions within events (e.g., tracks, time slots)

fields.Name: EventCEUAwards
fields.Description: Continuing education credit awards linked to events and certifications

fields.Name: EventRegistrationForms
fields.Description: Registration form definitions for events with auto-approval settings

fields.Name: EventIDs
fields.Description: Lightweight event identifier list for sync with last-modified date filtering

fields.Name: GroupMembershipLogs
fields.Description: Audit trail of group membership changes with member details and timestamps

fields.Name: DuesRules
fields.Description: Dues calculation rules with names, descriptions, and amount modifiers

fields.Name: MemberSubAccounts
fields.Description: Sub-account relationships linking dependent members to primary accounts

fields.Name: Countries
fields.Description: Country reference list with default country designation

fields.Name: Locations
fields.Description: States, provinces, and regions within countries with tax GL codes

fields.Name: ShippingMethods
fields.Description: Shipping method definitions with base pricing and weight-based rates

fields.Name: PaymentProcessors
fields.Description: Configured payment processors with active/primary status and card order types

fields.Name: CustomTaxLocations
fields.Description: Locations with custom tax rate overrides for commerce transactions

fields.Name: QBClasses
fields.Description: QuickBooks class definitions for accounting integration and financial categorization

fields.Name: MembershipModifiers
fields.Description: Price modifier rules per membership plan (discounts, surcharges)

fields.Name: MembershipPromoCodes
fields.Description: Promotional discount codes per membership plan with usage limits and expiration

fields.Name: Announcements
fields.Description: Admin announcements with title, text, publication dates, and active status

fields.Name: EmailSuppressionList
fields.Description: Email addresses suppressed from delivery with bounce counts and health rates

fields.Name: SponsorRotators
fields.Description: Sponsor advertisement rotator configurations with display settings

fields.Name: MemberNetworks
fields.Description: Social network profile links for members (LinkedIn, Twitter, etc.)

fields.Name: MemberFavorites
fields.Description: Bookmarked/favorited items per member for personalization tracking

fields.Name: TimeZones
fields.Description: Time zone reference data with GMT offsets and display names
